mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically boosting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rapid deterioration in the labor market signals impending recession risk, compressing earnings multiples and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strength in housing starts and nonfarm payrolls confirms broad-based demand expansion, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to predict positive returns in > 50% of out-of-sample instances over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation remains elevated above 3.5% while the federal funds rate stays above 5%, real rates stay restrictive, suppressing equity valuations and driving negative returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive when both series remain in the specified bands for consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production contraction indicates supply-side weakness and falling capacity utilization, leading to negative equity returns over the next month as corporate margins compress.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below 100.0 for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Industrial production declines do not precede negative SPX returns in the subsequent 20 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding 2.5% annualized rate reflects robust aggregate demand, driving positive short-term equity momentum over the next week as earnings revisions turn upward.
failure_condition: High GDP growth periods do not yield positive 5-day forward returns in > 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Strong job creation combined with sub-4% unemployment confirms a tight labor market supporting wage growth and consumer spending, boosting equity returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises > 150k in 3 months AND UNRATE < 4.0%
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict positive returns when both conditions are met over a 2-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in real savings indicates household balance sheet stress, reducing consumption demand and driving negative equity returns over the next quarter as corporate revenues fall.
failure_condition: Savings declines do not correspond to negative SPX forward returns in the subsequent 60 trading days.
